report.service: Product Fruits, a cloud-hosted software application

system_description.service_overview: Product Fruits is a cloud-hosted digital adoption platform for web applications.
cloud_providers_and_subservice_organizat: Amazon Web Services Inc. (AWS) is used to provide cloud Software-as-a-Service hosting.
GitHub is used to provide and host the GitHub application for source code repository, version control, and build software.
Microsoft Office 365 is used for office communication, file sharing, collaboration services, and Microsoft Office applications.

infrastructure_location.production_infrastructure: The production infrastructure for the Product Fruits software application is hosted on AWS in various regions across Europe.
infrastructure_location.backup_location: The SOC 2 report references business continuity and disaster recovery plans but does not specify a named backup region in the extracted system description.

monitoring: Monitoring of key infrastructure components is in place to collect and generate alerts based on utilization metrics.
System performance and availability monitoring mechanisms help ensure consistent delivery of the system and its components.
security_and_availability.business_continuity: Business continuity and disaster recovery plans are tested on a periodic basis.
security_and_availability.incident_notification: The SOC 2 report describes controls and commitments, but the extracted report text does not provide a specific client incident-notification SLA.

confidentiality_commitments: Encryption technologies are used to protect system data both at rest and in transit.
Confidentiality and non-disclosure agreements are used with employees, contractors, and third parties.
Confidential information must be used only for purposes explicitly stated in agreements between Product Fruits s.r.o. and user entities.
data_and_third_parties.third_party_processing: The report identifies AWS, GitHub, and Microsoft Office 365 as subservice organizations. It does not provide a complete personal-information data-flow inventory in the extracted sample.

monitoring_questionnaire_terms.application_performance_monitoring: The report references system performance, availability monitoring, infrastructure monitoring, utilization metrics, and alerts. It does not explicitly use the term Application Performance Monitoring (APM).
monitoring_questionnaire_terms.end_user_monitoring: The extracted report text does not explicitly mention End User Monitoring (EUM).
monitoring_questionnaire_terms.digital_experience_monitoring: The extracted report text does not explicitly mention Digital Experience Monitoring (DEM).
